case_title: MIKE D. PATEL et al VS. STEVEN MENDICK et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, MIKE D. DBA FRANCES HOTEL MIRANDA, KRISS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDICK, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET, UNIT 327, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENDICK, STEVEN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDICK, STEVEN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MENDICK, STEVEN
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MIKE D. DBA FRANCES HOTEL MIRANDA, KRISS AS TO DEFENDANT MENDICK, STEVEN
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MENDICK, STEVEN
DECLARATION OF MIKE PATEL RE: NO FORMAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MIKE D. DBA FRANCES HOTEL MIRANDA, KRISS
